rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND B SIMMONS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 25, 2013, line 1.(part 2 of 2) DEFENDANT AMERESCO, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to December 31, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than December 13, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRIEDMAN, SYLVIA A., AS SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE VS. LEO RUIZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 26, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT LEO RUIZ MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. GRANTED and the Court also construes Defendant's motion as motion to set aside default. Defendant was never properly served personally and there is no proof of service for valid substitute service on file. Default, default judgment, and writ of possession are set aside. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)
